description: This MCP prepares a phone-command launcher from the given prompt so step 2 can create a board object that opens the Flutter phone command page on click. Use it on requests about operating the phone.

tools.name: open_phone_command
tools.description: Use this when the user should get a whiteboard object that opens the stripped phone-command page with the stored prompt. This invoke call only prepares launch metadata; the actual phone-command POST happens after the object is opened.
